code:
import string
import io
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn top_k_desc(_ xs: List<Int>, _ k: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut count = 0
  let target = if k < xs.len()
    k
  else
    xs.len()
  end
  while count < target
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      mut new_remaining: List<Int> = []
      mut removed = false
      mut j = 0
      let rn = remaining.len()
      while j < rn
        match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(v)
          if v == m and not removed
            removed = true
          else
            new_remaining = list.push(new_remaining, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      remaining = new_remaining
      count = count + 1
    when None
      count = target
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let xs = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let top = top_k_desc(xs, k)

mut out = ""
mut idx = 0
let tlen = top.len()
while idx < tlen
  match top.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    if idx == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  idx = idx + 1
end
println(out)
